name: SINUS LIPOMATOSIS
definition: PERIPELVIC LIPOMATOSIS = PELVIC FIBROLIPOMATOSIS = PERIPELVIC FAT PROLIFERATION extreme form of renal sinus lipomatosis ← renal destruction / atrophy

demographics.Path: marked proliferation of hyperplastic sinus fat with extremely atrophied cortex +

distribution: occasionally focal fat deposit with localized deformity of collecting system
discriminating_features: fat characteristically distributed within renal sinus + perinephric space
parenchymal thickness diminished with underlying disease

general: parenchymal thickness diminished with underlying disease
occasionally focal fat deposit with localized deformity of collecting system
US: kidney enlarged by a fatty sinus mass and outlined by an extremely thin cortex:
fat characteristically distributed within renal sinus + perinephric space
staghorn calculus inside an enlarged renal outline
